response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed on-screen text: Title "MIR//or" and credits.
2. Performed web search for "MIR//or Ayunda Risu lyrics" to find the official bilingual Indonesian/English lyrics.
3. Identified Ayunda Risu as the performer.
4. Compiled scenes based on the song progression.
response.global_summary: The video features an animated performance of the song "MIR//or" by the Hololive ID VTuber Ayunda Risu, set against a background of a burning village.

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu performs the song "MIR//or" in an animated, burning village setting. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
If I love you, would you love me too?
Utaraku kecil dahulu
The love will last, it will
Selamanya 'ku kan peduli, right?
Through me (To me)
Broken thing have I become
And you still love, respect
Truly I never had enough
Ordinary day, it seems
The clouds of a lie in the sky
Painted, coloring my paradise
The thick rain, wash away all
Luka-duka, emosi manusia
Rapuh dan terjebak
Lara di dunia
The rain, finally let go
Lingers on my ego
Burning light that radiates
Evaporates, the sad and lonely me
A soundless whisper, follow me
Never let go
But, hug, hug
Hug, the loneliness
How real
My tears, in this world
To me, obsessive have I become
And you still love, respect
Truly I will never give in
Ordinary, I will be
The clouds of the color of a rainbow
Started to show me my paradise
The thick rain, wash away all
Luka-duka, emosi manusia
Rapuh dan terjebak
Lara di dunia
Hi, finally, it's so nice to meet you
I want to love you, but, for, for
For me
The thick rain, wash away all
Bersih, suka dan duka, perasaan manusia
Dan melebur, satu warna
Yang bermakna
The rain, finally let go
Lingers on my ego
Burning light that radiates
Evaporates, the sad and lonely me
A soundless whisper, follow me
Never let go
But, hug, hug
Hug, the loneliness
How real
My tears, in this world
To me, obsessive have I become
And you still love, respect
Truly I will never give in
Ordinary, I will be
The clouds of the color of a rainbow
Started to show me my paradise
The thick rain, wash away all
Luka-duka, emosi manusia
Rapuh dan terjebak
Lara di dunia
Hi, finally, it's so nice to meet you
I want to love you, but, for, for
For me
The thick rain, wash away all
Bersih, suka dan duka, perasaan manusia
Dan melebur, satu warna
Yang bermakna
I finally can see
My paradise
I want to love you
But, for, for, for me...
